rationale: player flow closes through warm-up, play, tracking, cool-down, and replay
Stoicheia remains a shadow lobe because it is archive-visible but not live-integrated

stable_surfaces: GAMES contains a product family, not a single title
FITChain, FITChain Elite, and FITQUEST share a common movement kernel
QR-linked instruction is a first-class design layer
the strongest convergence happens in late April 2024
FITQUEST is the narrative transmutation of the same fitness kernel used by FITChain
blockers: live Google Docs gate blocked by missing OAuth material
Stoicheia front/back archive entries have weak text witness
next_moves: build one canonical family ledger for deck math and SKU math
mirror image-only instruction surfaces into markdown witnesses
decode or register every QR destination URL
reopen Stoicheia into a live mirror or dedicated archive capsule
write one family-level manual describing the shared kernel and each game's specialization
